title: MikroTik CSS610-8P-2S+OUT Gbit PoE switch
description: The MikroTik netPower Lite 8P is a reliable outdoor managed PoE switch with UPS functionality and support for solar panel power input . It offers a switching capacity of 56Gbps , (8) 1Gbit PoE+ ports , (2) SFP+ slots , a smart battery charger and manages power flow between solar panels, the battery and the connected load. Maximum power consumption is 7W (without load) (8) 1Gbit PoE+ ports and (2) SFP+ slots PoE+ 802.3af/at with a total budget of 120W SwOS Lite - a fast, efficient and refreshingly simple to manage operating system Alarm input - connect a simple 2-wire contact for tamper detection UPS - supports flooded, AGM and gel lead-acid batteries, as well as LiFePO4 batteries with a proper BMS Flexible power options - powered by a battery or via a 24-57V DC terminal Device (2) Hose clamps (4) Screws and wall anchors Temperature sensor
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (8) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (2) 10Gbps Power Power type DC terminal, Battery PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at Redundant power supply Yes PoE Out ports 8 PoE budget [W] 120 Max. power consumption [W] 181 Power via connector/terminal 24 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design Outdoor Fans No Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 212 Height [mm] 78 Depth [mm] 303 Hardware Internal storage [MB] 64 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 56 MAC address table 16000 Jumbo frame [Bytes] 10218 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 41,7
